description: The SAP S/4HANA Sales connector provides APIs that enable seamless integration with the [Incoterm - Read (A2X) v1.0.0](https://api.sap.com/api/API_SD_INCOTERMS_SRV/overview). The service allows users to read incoterms defined in the system.
key-features: Read incoterms defined in SAP S/4HANA
Seamless integration with the Incoterm - Read (A2X) API v1.0.0
Support for basic and OAuth 2.0 authentication
Operations for querying incoterm master data
